title: Moeve Will Invest â‚¬600 Million to Develop 30 Biomethane Plants in Spain
content: Moeve plans to invest â‚¬600 million to develop 30 biomethane plants in Spain by 2030, targeting regions like Andalusia, Catalonia, and Galicia. The initiative, part of its Positive Motion strategy, aims to produce 4TWh of biomethane annually from agricultural and livestock waste, reducing CO2 emissions by 728,000 tons yearly and reusing 10 million tons of waste. Partnerships with Kira Ventures, PreZero, and InproEner (with EnviTec Biogas) will support the development, with five plants expected by 2028-2029. Biomethane will aid decarbonization, green hydrogen production, and sustainable mobility, while boosting rural economies and waste management. Moeve aims for a 55% reduction in CO2 emissions by 2030 and carbon neutrality by 2050.
author: Analysts Account
